Geertgen tot Sint Jans

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Adoration of the Magi
by Geertgen tot Sint Jans
Early Netherlandish · c. 1480
Mary and the child Jesus in a rubble-walled ruin, the magi advancing in procession across the background. Geertgen's pale, doll-like figures and closed compositions influenced Dutch painting for a century.
←Wijnants, Jan Japan→
